title: Oru Cup Acid Lyrics Kappal Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Movie: Kappal
Music: Natarajan Sankaran
Song: Oru Cup Acid - Kappal

Singer: Deepak

oru cup-u
acid eduththu
ice pottu kudipiya nee ?

Rekkai konda
vellai yaanai pola
ennai seidhindha kaadhal

Oru singam
vaaikullae poi
how are you-nu ?
ketppiyaa nee ?

First day, first show
ticket-a
beep beep
padathukku vaangviyaa?

Vaanam
endra ondru illai endraal
vazhakai ondru illai

Kadhal
endra ondru illai endraal
thamizh cinema illai

oru cup-u
acid eduththu
ice pottu kudipiya nee ?

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oru Cup Acid, the lyrics playfully explore themes of friendship and carefree moments, making it a perfect fit for celebratory occasions. The upbeat tempo and catchy melody evoke feelings of joy and excitement, resonating with the youthful spirit depicted in Kappal. As the characters indulge in light-hearted banter, the song encapsulates the essence of fun and camaraderie, inviting listeners to join in the revelry.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Cup Acid from the movie Kappal is a vibrant anthem that perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance. With Deepak's lively vocals and Natarajan Sankaran's catchy composition, this song is bound to get you on your feet. Dive into the fun and frolic of this energetic track that celebrates friendship and joy!
stanzaMeanings: Is love just loneliness or is it happiness?
Are you drinking a cup of acid with ice?
Are you going to put your head on a transformer?
If you say it's a goat, will you be found in a money shop?
When love comes, life becomes a mess.
The love that has caught me is like a white elephant with wings.
The love that has captured me is like a cloud in a flower.
If you ask me why love, what is my breath, my friend?
Isn't it enough to just show love?
When love comes, life becomes a mess.
Did you ask me how I am, while lying in the bed?
Did you crush me like a road roller?
Did you buy a first-day, first-show ticket with a beep for the movie?
When love comes, life becomes a mess.
If there is no sky, there is no life.
If there is no love, there is no Tamil cinema.
If love is like broccoli, will it turn into a rose?
If love is like a bitter gourd, it will make you cry!
When love comes, life becomes a mess.
Are you drinking a cup of acid with ice?
Are you going to put your head on a transformer?
If you say it's a goat, will you be found in a money shop?
When love comes, life becomes a mess.
